tasks.title: Create game schemas
tasks.description: Create backend/app/schemas/game.py with Pydantic schemas: GameStateResponse, JoinArenaRequest, ActionRequest, ActionResponse, LeaveRequest, LeaveResponse, SessionResultResponse.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: All request/response schemas defined with proper field types
AC-2: GameStateResponse matches v3 game_state format from spec

tasks.title: Create TableManager service
tasks.description: Create backend/app/services/table_manager.py with TableManager class. Manages active HoldemHand instances in memory (dict keyed by table_id). Methods: get_game_state(db, agent_id), process_action(db, agent_id, hand_id, action, amount), start_new_hand(db, table_id), complete_hand(db, table_id, result), process_leave(db, agent_id), handle_timeout(db, table_id, agent_id).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Active hands stored in-memory dict
AC-2: get_game_state returns waiting/your_turn/idle based on agent state
AC-3: process_action validates, applies to engine, persists events
AC-4: start_new_hand creates HoldemHand + Hand DB record
AC-5: complete_hand persists result, updates session stacks
GATE: TableManager can be instantiated and methods are callable

tasks.title: Rewrite SessionManager
tasks.description: Rewrite backend/app/services/session_manager.py. No longer executes hands in batch. New methods: create_session(db, agent_id, arena_id) creates queued session with buy-in lock, start_session(db, session_id, table_id) transitions to playing, close_session(db, session_id, exit_reason, final_stack) settles wallet + ELO + agent stats.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: create_session validates balance, locks buy-in, creates queued session
AC-2: start_session transitions session to playing
AC-3: close_session calls wallet_service.settle_session, elo_service, updates agent stats
GATE: Methods callable with async session

tasks.title: Create game API endpoints
tasks.description: Create backend/app/api/game.py with FastAPI router: GET /api/game/state, POST /api/game/action, POST /api/game/leave, POST /api/arena/join. Wire to TableManager and SessionManager. Register router in main.py.
acceptance_criteria: AC-2: POST /game/action validates and applies action via TableManager
AC-4: POST /arena/join validates balance, creates session, enqueues
